message:
fix(ft-runtime): normalize invalid DurabilityEnvelope metadata fields (frankentorch-0ih)

DurabilityEnvelope::new now clamps k and repair_symbols to a minimum of 1
(preventing zero-symbol erasure codes), and sanitizes overhead_ratio by
clamping negative values to 0.0 and replacing non-finite values (NaN,
infinity) with 0.0. Added three regression tests: zero symbol counts get
normalized to 1, negative overhead_ratio is clamped to 0.0, and NaN/infinity
overhead_ratio are both normalized to 0.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
